features: 15 COLORS FACE PAINTING： Contains 15 colors of face and body painting, 2 brushes and 32 different templates. By mixing two or more different colors, you will be pleasantly surprised to get a new color.

SAFETY TO USE： This face painting kit is suitable for all children or adults with sensitive skin. Hypoallergenic, skin-friendly, will not cause itching or skin irritation. Safe and gentle on sensitive skin.

EASY TO USE： Mix with water before use, add a few drops of water to the desired color to make the surface a paste, and then apply it evenly on the skin surface with a brush. After the party is over, you can clean it with wet paper towels or soap towels.

32 COLOR DRAWING TEMPLATES： Contains 32 face color drawing templates, which can stimulate children's imagination and creativity, and can meet the requirements of creating different paintings on the face or body. Note: The template pattern is random.

WIDE USE： This face painting suit is very suitable for any special events, such as Halloween, birthday parties, fancy dress parties, Christmas, bridal makeup modeling, makeup teaching, holiday painting, etc. A great gift for children and adults.
description: Product Description Various Figure Templates Don't worry you can not paint well in your face, using various figure templates can solve your problem. You can choose the different cute templates, painted with different colors on your face or hands. Enjoy the happy time. Gentle for Sensitive Skin High quality material,Hypoallergenic, skin-friendly and won't cause itching or irritate the skin. safe, professional cosmetic make-up for children and adults with sensitive skin, non-toxic, natural. Wide Application Good for all occasions and celebrations. Whether school parties, children's parties, festivals, the carnival, carnival, birthday parties, football, theater performances, role-playing. Can be used for Halloween makeup Birthday party Christmas School events
